ddls:
CREATE TABLE "energy_nodes" (
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy node */,
  "node_type" TEXT /* Type of node (e.g., Generation, Substation, Consumer) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the node in MWh */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the node */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the node (e.g., active, maintenance, offline) */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Last time the node's data was updated */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the node's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the node's location */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Entity or organization that owns the node */,
  "maintenance_start" TEXT /* Start time of maintenance */,
  "maintenance_end" TEXT /* End time of maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "connections" (
  "connection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each connection */,
  "node1" INTEGER /* First node in the connection */,
  "node2" INTEGER /* Second node in the connection */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the connection in MWh */,
  "susceptance" INTEGER /* Susceptance of the connection */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance between the two nodes */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the connection (e.g., active, maintenance, offline) */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Last time the connection's data was updated */,
  "transmission_loss" REAL /* Percentage of energy loss during transmission */,
  "last_maintenance" TEXT /* Last maintenance date of the connection */,
  "next_maintenance" TEXT /* Next scheduled maintenance date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("connection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_connections_node1 FOREIGN KEY ("node1") REFERENCES energy_nodes ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_connections_node2 FOREIGN KEY ("node2") REFERENCES energy_nodes ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "costs" (
  "cost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost entry */,
  "connection_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the connection the cost applies to */,
  "cost_fixed" REAL /* Fixed cost associated with the connection */,
  "cost_linear" REAL /* Variable cost per unit of energy transmitted */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the cost period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the cost period */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the costs are denominated */,
  "cost_quadratic" REAL /* Quadratic cost factor */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the cost data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_costs_connection_id FOREIGN KEY ("connection_id") REFERENCES connections ("connection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., network engineer, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged into the system */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Last time the user performed an activity in the system */,
  "access_level" INTEGER /* Access level of the user (e.g., 1 for basic, 2 for intermediate, 3 for advanced) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
